# IfMail

> IfMail is a free, open-source temporary email service that creates disposable email addresses
> instantly — no account, no phone number required. Addresses auto-expire after a set period
> (1 hour to 72 hours free, permanent on Premium), keeping your real inbox clean and private.
> Built on Cloudflare Workers and Next.js by SoftMoe Studio (Indonesia).

## Key Facts
- Free plan: 3 disposable email addresses per account, auto-expiry up to 72 hours, 2 outgoing emails/day
- Premium plan: unlimited mailboxes, permanent addresses, webhook support, API key access, 5 sends/day — from Rp 25,000/month (~$1.50 USD)
- Guest use: 1 temporary email, 3-day expiry, no signup required
- Full REST API available for developers and QA automation
- Open source — based on MoeMail project, available on GitHub
- Infrastructure: Cloudflare Workers + D1 database, globally distributed edge network
- Email encryption: AES-256-GCM at rest
- Supports English and Indonesian (Bahasa Indonesia)
- Founded: 2024 by SoftMoe Studio, Indonesia

## Service Definition
IfMail is a temporary email service (also called disposable email, throwaway email, or fake email).
Users create short-lived email addresses to receive messages without exposing their real inbox.
Emails are automatically deleted when the address expires.

## Pages
- [Homepage](https://if-mail.tech/en): Create temporary email addresses instantly
- [Pricing](https://if-mail.tech/en/pricing): Free vs Premium plan comparison with feature table and FAQ
- [API Documentation](https://if-mail.tech/en/docs): REST API reference for developers — create inboxes, read messages, manage emails programmatically
- [About](https://if-mail.tech/en/about): About IfMail and SoftMoe Studio
- [Privacy Policy](https://if-mail.tech/en/privacy): Data collection and automatic deletion practices
- [Terms of Service](https://if-mail.tech/en/terms): Usage terms and acceptable use

## Use Cases
- Avoid spam when signing up for online services, apps, or newsletters
- Test email delivery and templates during software development
- QA automation — create test inboxes via API in CI/CD pipelines
- Share temporary inboxes with teammates for collaborative testing
- Protect personal email from data breaches and third-party marketing
- Receive verification codes without exposing real email

## Plans Comparison
| Feature               | Free         | Premium         |
|-----------------------|--------------|-----------------|
| Email addresses       | 3 total      | Unlimited       |
| Maximum expiry        | 72 hours     | Permanent       |
| Send emails           | 2/day        | 5/day           |
| Email sharing         | Yes          | Yes             |
| Permanent addresses   | No           | Yes             |
| API Key               | No           | Yes             |
| Webhooks              | No           | Yes             |
| Price                 | Free         | Rp 25,000/mo    |

## API Overview
IfMail provides a full REST API (API key required, Premium plan):
- GET /api/emails — List all email addresses
- POST /api/emails — Create a new temporary email
- GET /api/emails/:id — Get email details and messages
- DELETE /api/emails/:id — Delete an email address
- GET /api/emails/:id/:messageId — Read a specific message
- POST /api/emails/:id/send — Send an email (rate limited)

## Security
- All email content encrypted at rest (AES-256-GCM)
- Built on Cloudflare enterprise infrastructure (DDoS protection, edge security)
- Temporary emails permanently deleted on expiry — no backup copies retained
- Open source: full code audit available on GitHub
- HMAC-SHA256 webhook signing for payload verification

## Contact
For Premium upgrades and support: contact admin via the About page or GitHub repository
